prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: PromptArc homepage hero proof tile
Primary request: premium skincare product hero shot for an AI image generation product homepage
Scene/backdrop: dark obsidian studio surface with subtle water arcs and clean negative space
Subject: elegant unlabeled cosmetic jar, no brand logo, no readable text
Style/medium: polished commercial product photography, high-end ecommerce ad quality
Composition/framing: vertical crop, product centered slightly low, clear silhouette, useful as a small hero tile
Lighting/mood: soft morning key light, crisp rim highlights, restrained premium mood
Color palette: cool whites, graphite, pale cyan reflections, restrained green accent only if natural
Materials/textures: glossy glass, wet stone, fine condensation, realistic reflections
Constraints: no watermark, no logo, no text, no distorted packaging, no extra products, image must feel like a real generated result from PromptArc
composition: vertical homepage hero tile with strong product silhouette
lighting: soft studio lighting with crisp reflections
constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no malformed labels

prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: PromptArc homepage hero proof tile
Primary request: cinematic poster design visual that demonstrates AI-generated campaign imagery
Scene/backdrop: abstract night city atmosphere with bold central composition and layered depth
Subject: no people required, a dramatic poster-like graphic scene with light beams and shape rhythm
Style/medium: premium cinematic poster art, polished, not sketchy, not comic
Composition/framing: vertical crop, strong central focal point, readable at small tile size, no typography
Lighting/mood: dramatic contrast, magenta and deep violet highlights, controlled not neon-cluttered
Color palette: deep violet, black, subtle red-orange glow, limited palette
Materials/textures: glossy atmospheric haze, clean graphic planes, filmic grain kept minimal
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no fake movie title, no messy symbols
composition: vertical poster tile, strong central focal point, no typography
constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark
